violations.text: Allergen advisory statement is not present on menus. All menus to include a notice to customers of the customer’s obligation to inform the server about any food allergies. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2025

Blender, utensils and food debris were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

Raw shelled eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as peppers in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

Glue trap for flies observed stored over clean dishes. Insect control devices shall be installed so that the devices are not located over a food preparation area; and dead insects and insect fragments are prevented from being impelled onto or falling on exposed food, clean equipment, utensils, linens and unwrapped single service ware. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving in the walk-in cooler and lined FRP near trash area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 12/29/2025
The kitchen hood vents have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2026

Allergen advisory statement is not present on menus. All menus to include a notice to customers of the customer’s obligation to inform the server about any food allergies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/15/2025

Raw shelled eggs were observed stored above sliced carrots in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Various foods in the walk-in cooler were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Wood is used in the construction of shelving in the cookline area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/15/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the handsink and food prep sink have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the kitchen area and dry storage are. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/15/2025

Utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. -Staff removed the utensils during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

Raw animal foods (such as beef) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked chicken and cooked pork) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. -Staff moved the raw beef and placed it under the ready-to-eat foods during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was (0) parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. -Service was contacted. -Establishment will sanitize in the 3 bay sink until dishwasher has been serviced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 12/22/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the areas underneath/behind all kitchen equipment have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. The non-food contact surfaces shall be cleaned as often as necessary to prevent buildup of residue. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/08/2023

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2023

Maintenance tools observed stored with single service items and dry goods. 6-501.113 Storing Maintenance Tools. Maintenance tools such as brooms, mops, vacuum cleaners, and similar items shall be: (A) Stored so they do not contaminate FOOD, EQUIPMENT, UTENSILS, LINENS, and SINGLE-SERVICE and SINGLE-USE ARTICLES -Staff moved the maintenance tool away from equipment and single service items during this inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/27/2023
